Students

Current Students

Huangkang Lin PhD Candidate @LSU Student · Since 2025 MoE Security Coadvise with Prof. Minxuan Sun
Dushan Herath PhD Candidate @LSU Student · Since 2026 AI Security Coadvise with Prof. Xiangwei Zhou
Tiancheng Zheng MS @UCLA Student · Since 2025 AI Security Will join Northeastern University for PhD in Fall 2026

Prospective Students

I am actively recruiting PhD students for Fall 2026 and Spring 2027 with interests in LLM Security, AI Security, Hardware Security, and Side-Channel Analysis.

What I look for:

  • Strong mathematical background (linear algebra, probability, statistics)
  • Programming skills (Python, C/C++)
  • Passion for research and security

Fully-funded positions with competitive stipend and tuition waiver are available.

Apply via Google Form

Or email your CV and research statement to ruyiding@lsu.edu
